---
id: send-text
title: "Mensaje de Texto"
description: "Permite enviar un mensaje de texto a un número de WhatsApp."
sidebar_label: "Enviar Mensaje de Texto"
sidebar_position: 1
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: qr-devs/api/api-externa/api-externa-mensajeria-simple
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Enviar Mensaje de Texto"}
></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/message/send-text"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Permite enviar un mensaje de texto a un número de WhatsApp.
El campo 'number' debe ser el número en formato internacional sin el '+'.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails parameters={undefined}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{
    description: "Datos para enviar el mensaje de texto.",
    required: true,
    content: {
      "application/json": {
        schema: {
          type: "object",
          required: ["number", "message"],
          properties: {
            number: {
              type: "string",
              example: "123456789",
              description:
                'Número de teléfono en formato internacional sin el "+".',
            },
            message: {
              type: "string",
              example: "Plain text message",
              description: "El mensaje de texto a enviar.",
            },
          },
          title: "SendTextRequest",
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "Mensaje enviado correctamente",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            properties: {
              data: {
                type: "object",
                properties: {
                  key: {
                    type: "object",
                    properties: {
                      remoteJid: {
                        type: "string",
                        example: "51123456789@s.whatsapp.net",
                      },
                      fromMe: { type: "boolean", example: true },
                      id: { type: "string", example: "BAE51C2115EE6FC0" },
                    },
                  },
                  messageTimestamp: { type: "string", example: "1726586899" },
                  status: { type: "string", example: "PENDING" },
                },
              },
            },
            title: "SuccessResponse",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "400": {
      description: "Error en la solicitud",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            properties: {
              error: { type: "string", example: "Descripción del error" },
            },
            title: "ErrorResponse",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "401": {
      description: "No autorizado",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            properties: {
              error: { type: "string", example: "Descripción del error" },
            },
            title: "ErrorResponse",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
